question: The state of Kerala has 140 assembly seats.
You can vote if you are a tourist from another country.
The ballot paper was used before the machines came.
You can vote using your school ID card.
The results are kept secret until counting day.
A person can be a candidate in two places.
You can vote for a candidate who has died.
The ink is applied to the left-hand index finger.
Elections are held in phases across the country.
The Prime Minister chooses who wins the seats.
